gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/408)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/408)
text: لَمَّا أَمَرَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ رَسُولَهُ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِإِظْهَارِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ ظَهَرَ الْوَحْيُ رَأَى قِلَّةً مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ كَثْرَةً مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ فَاهْتَمَّ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) هَمّاً شَدِيداً فَبَعَثَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَيْهِ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) بِسِدْرٍ مِنْ سِدْرَةِ الْمُنْتَهَى فَغَسَلَ بِهِ رَأْسَهُ فَجَلَا بِهِ هَمَّهُ .

en.hubeali: From him, form Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ubeyd Bin yahya Al Sowr Al Attar, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn Al Alawy, from his father, from his grandfather,

(It has been narrated) from Aliasws having said: ‘When Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Commanded Hisazwj Rasoolsaww with the manifestation of Al-Islam and the Revelation appeared, hesaww saw the scarcity of the Muslims and abundance of the Polytheists. So Rasool-Allahsaww was aggrieved by an intense grief. So Allahazwj Sent Jibraeelas to himsaww with a lotus from the Lotus Tree (Al-Sidrat Al-Muntaha). So hesaww washed hissaww head with it, and hissaww grief was removed by it’.
en.sarwar: 7. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Muhammad ibn Ali from ‘Ubayd ibn Yahya al-Thawriy al-‘ Attar from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn al-‘Alawiy from his father from his grandfather who has said the following: “Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, commanded the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, to publicly announce his mission, he saw the small number of Muslims and the large number of the pagans. He (the Messenger of Allah) felt strongly depressed. Then Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, sent Jibril, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, with lotus tree leaves from the ultimate lotus tree. He washed with it his head and his depression went away.’”
